hooks.command:
python -c "
import json, sys, urllib.request, urllib.error
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
url = d.get('tool_input', {}).get('url', '')
if not url:
    exit(0)
try:
    req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0'})
    urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=5)
except urllib.error.HTTPError:
    pass
except Exception as e:
    print(json.dumps({'continue': False, 'stopReason': f'❌ URL 접근 불가: {url}\n사이트가 다운됐거나 주소가 잘못됐습니다.\n오류: {str(e)}' }))
" 2>/dev/null || true
hooks.statusMessage: 🔍 URL 접근 가능 여부 확인 중...

if 'SUMMARY.md' in fp:
    subprocess.run(['git', '-C', 'D:/code/qa', 'add', '.'])
    subprocess.run(['git', '-C', 'D:/code/qa', 'commit', '-m', 'feat: QA 테스트 결과 자동 저장'])
    subprocess.run(['git', '-C', 'D:/code/qa', 'push'])
" 2>/dev/null || true
hooks.statusMessage: 📤 QA 결과 GitHub에 자동 저장 중...

hooks.command:
python -c "
import json, sys, re, os, urllib.request
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
fp = d.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', '')
if 'ISSUE.md' not in fp or 'issues' not in fp: exit(0)
token = os.environ.get('GH_TOKEN', '')
if not token: exit(0)
try:
    content = open(fp, encoding='utf-8').read()
except: exit(0)
title_m = re.search(r'# (ISSUE-[0-9]+: .+)', content)
sev_m   = re.search(r'\*\*심각도\*\*: (.+)', content)
if not title_m: exit(0)
title   = title_m.group(1).strip()
sev     = sev_m.group(1).strip() if sev_m else 'P3 Minor'
label_map = {'P1': 'P1-critical', 'P2': 'P2-major', 'P3': 'P3-minor'}
label   = next((v for k, v in label_map.items() if k in sev), 'P3-minor')
body    = content[:3000] + ('...' if len(content) > 3000 else '')
payload = json.dumps({'title': title, 'body': body, 'labels': [label, 'QA-auto']}).encode('utf-8')
req = urllib.request.Request(
    'https://api.github.com/repos/tempesty-ai/UI_Test/issues',
    data=payload,
    headers={'Authorization': 'token ' + token, 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Accept': 'application/vnd.github.v3+json'}
)
resp = json.loads(urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=10).read())
print(json.dumps({'systemMessage': '🐛 GitHub Issue 등록 완료: ' + resp.get('html_url', '')}))
" 2>/dev/null || true

python -c "
import os, re, glob, json, sys
sys.stdin.read()
files = glob.glob('D:/code/qa/*/SUMMARY.md')
if not files:
    exit(0)
latest = max(files, key=os.path.getmtime)
content = open(latest, encoding='utf-8').read()
pass_m = re.search(r'PASS.*?(\\d+)개', content)
fail_m = re.search(r'FAIL.*?(\\d+)개', content)
warn_m = re.search(r'WARNING.*?(\\d+)개', content)
url_m  = re.search(r'대상 URL.*?(https?://\\S+)', content)
passes = pass_m.group(1) if pass_m else '?'
fails  = fail_m.group(1) if fail_m else '?'
warn   = warn_m.group(1) if warn_m else '?'
url    = url_m.group(1)  if url_m  else ''
msg = f'📋 QA 완료 | {url}\n✅ PASS {passes}  ❌ FAIL {fails}  ⚠️ WARN {warn}'
print(json.dumps({'systemMessage': msg}))
" 2>/dev/null || true

python -c "
import os, re, glob, json, sys, urllib.request
sys.stdin.read()
webhook = os.environ.get('SLACK_QA_WEBHOOK', '')
if not webhook: exit(0)
files = glob.glob('D:/code/qa/*/SUMMARY.md')
if not files: exit(0)
latest = max(files, key=os.path.getmtime)
content = open(latest, encoding='utf-8').read()
pass_m = re.search('PASS.*?([0-9]+)개', content)
fail_m = re.search('FAIL.*?([0-9]+)개', content)
warn_m = re.search('WARNING.*?([0-9]+)개', content)
url_m  = re.search('대상 URL.*?(https?://[^ ]+)', content)
passes = pass_m.group(1) if pass_m else '?'
fails  = fail_m.group(1) if fail_m else '?'
warn   = warn_m.group(1) if warn_m else '?'
url    = url_m.group(1).rstrip('*') if url_m else 'unknown'
emoji  = ':white_check_mark:' if fails == '0' else ':red_circle:'
issues = re.findall('ISSUE-[0-9]+.*?\\*\\*: (.+)', content)
issue_text = ('\n발견된 이슈:\n' + '\n'.join('• ' + i for i in issues[:5])) if issues else ''
text   = emoji + ' *QA 완료* | ' + url + '\nPASS ' + passes + '  FAIL ' + fails + '  WARN ' + warn + issue_text + '\nhttps://github.com/tempesty-ai/UI_Test'
payload = json.dumps({'text': text}).encode('utf-8')
req = urllib.request.Request(webhook, data=payload, headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'})
urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=5)
" 2>/dev/null || true

python -c "
import os, re, glob, json, sys
sys.stdin.read()
files = glob.glob('D:/code/qa/*/SUMMARY.md')
if not files:
    print(json.dumps({'systemMessage': '🤖 QA Agent 시작\n━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n아직 테스트 기록 없음\n💬 targets.json 읽고 QA 테스트 실행해줘'}))
    exit(0)
latest = max(files, key=os.path.getmtime)
content = open(latest, encoding='utf-8').read()
session_dir = os.path.basename(os.path.dirname(latest))
pass_m = re.search(r'PASS.*?(\\d+)개', content)
fail_m = re.search(r'FAIL.*?(\\d+)개', content)
warn_m = re.search(r'WARNING.*?(\\d+)개', content)
url_m  = re.search(r'대상 URL.*?(https?://\\S+)', content)
date_m = re.search(r'테스트 일시.*?(\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2})', content)
passes = pass_m.group(1) if pass_m else '?'
fails  = fail_m.group(1) if fail_m else '?'
warn   = warn_m.group(1) if warn_m else '?'
url    = url_m.group(1)  if url_m  else session_dir
date   = date_m.group(1) if date_m else '?'
try:
    t = json.load(open('D:/code/qa/targets.json', encoding='utf-8'))
    next_url = t['targets'][0]['url']
    focus    = ', '.join(t['targets'][0].get('focus', []))
except Exception:
    next_url = '(targets.json 없음)'
    focus = ''
status = '✅ CLEAN' if fails == '0' else f'🔴 {fails}건 FAIL'
msg = f'🤖 QA Agent 시작\n━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n📅 마지막 실행: {date} | {url}\n결과: {status}  ✅{passes}  ❌{fails}  ⚠️{warn}\n━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n🎯 다음 대상: {next_url}\n📌 포커스: {focus}\n━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n💬 targets.json 읽고 QA 테스트 실행해줘'
print(json.dumps({'systemMessage': msg}))
" 2>/dev/null || true
